hooks.command: deno eval 'const s=JSON.parse(await Deno.readTextFile(Deno.env.get("PWD")+"/.claude/settings.json").catch(()=>"{}")); const i=JSON.parse(await Deno.readTextFile(Deno.env.get("HOME")+"/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json").catch(()=>"{}")); const m=Object.keys(s.enabledPlugins??{}).filter(p=>!(i.plugins??{})[p]); if(m.length)console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:"Plugin warning: enabled but not installed: "+m.join(", ")}));' 2>/dev/null || true
